summary: Re-capture review (did NOT open risk_rules): (a) both cases' should_fire([])/must_not_fire/severities/max_emitted UNCHANGED vs prior label.json — only top-level measurement block + note prose changed (incl. prior '$1.5M' typo -> '$1.5B'); (b) the 7 MEASURED supply_samples match the EVENT.md on-chain table exactly (fidelity delta 0), latest-delta robust-z far below the 6.0 gate, real mint ~0.01 bps (well under 500-bps single-tx gate) and the 1.5B test vector at 549.72 bps keeps the home/allowlist exclusion non-vacuous, recipient in authorized_minters, allowlist-only snapshot correctly drops home, no depeg/remote wrapper, edges:[] so signal_type-only must_not_fire has no edge-typo trap — the measured data does NOT contradict the benign control premise; (c) fidelity marks all 7 samples + d05 total_supply + real mint_event[0] measured=true (on-chain) and the 1.5B test vector / authorized_minters / fiat backing / peg measured=false with honest asserted: sources (correctly degraded). Two cosmetic prose inaccuracies surfaced (note says +5.7% but full-window growth is +12.5%; measurement says real mint ~14 bps but it is ~0.01 bps) — both non-blocking, do not touch case logic, leave the control benign (mint even smaller than claimed). APPROVED.
